entries.concept_hook: A Greek opera singer whose lethal hypnotic voice was forged through a forbidden pact with an ancient sea deity, using song to shatter minds and bend opponents to her will.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Classic Greek mythology meets femme fatale seductress from film noir

entries.concept_hook: A Russian underground fight club champion whose brute strength and pain tolerance are legendary—he's never lost a street fight and rarely remembers them due to the concussions.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Russian bear-fighter archetype from Eastern European fight lore, brutal and unstoppable

entries.concept_hook: A Japanese ghost of the shadows—a former ninja clan assassin who abandoned her masters when she discovered they'd been selling her sisters into servitude.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Classic female ninja from Japanese media, stealthy and lethal

entries.concept_hook: A German combat analyst and precision striker who fights like a chess grandmaster—every movement calculated, every opponent dissected before the first punch lands.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Calculated intellectual fighter archetype from combat sports cinema

entries.concept_hook: A Moroccan oracle cursed with visions of death who uses her prophetic gifts to dominate opponents—her opponents always see their own demise in her crystalline eyes before she strikes.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Mystical seer from Middle Eastern folklore meets tarot card fortune teller

entries.concept_hook: A grizzled American mercenary who fought in three continents before his fortieth birthday—now he trains fighters and occasionally steps into the ring to remind young lions why experience matters.
entries.media_archetype_inspiration: Battle-worn mentor archetype from Western and war cinema
